description: JavaScript Refactoring: Move Inline Scripts to External .js Files

tasks.title: Create External JavaScript File (tab-switching.js)
tasks.notes: Extract inline JavaScript from Manager Actions and Operator Actions Pages into external file: wp-content/themes/blocksy-child/assets/js/tab-switching.js. Better caching, no WordPress filtering issues.

tasks.title: Enqueue JavaScript in functions.php
tasks.notes: Add wp_enqueue_script() call in blocksy-child/functions.php to load tab-switching.js only on action pages. Includes version for cache busting.

tasks.title: Update Manager Actions Page (Remove Inline Script)
tasks.notes: Remove inline <script> tags from Manager Actions page (ID 27 local, 105 production). Replace with HTML block referencing external file or rely on functions.php enqueue.

tasks.title: Update Operator Actions Page (Remove Inline Script)
tasks.notes: Remove inline <script> tags from Operator Actions page (ID 49 local, 84 production). Replace with HTML block referencing external file or rely on functions.php enqueue.

tasks.title: Test Tab Switching Functionality (Local)
tasks.notes: Verify tab switching works on both Manager Actions and Operator Actions pages in local environment. Test tab clicks, hover effects, active tab styling.

tasks.title: Deploy to Production
tasks.notes: Deploy theme files (tab-switching.js, functions.php) and updated pages to production. Flush caches. Verify tab switching works on production.

testingNotes: Test Manager Actions tab switching on local (https://wp.local/managers/actions/)
Test Operator Actions tab switching on local (https://wp.local/operators/actions/)
Verify JavaScript file loads (check browser DevTools Network tab)
Verify no JavaScript errors in browser console
Test tab hover effects (inactive tabs should highlight)
Test tab click behavior (content switches, active tab styling changes)
Verify page loads faster (external JS cached after first load)
Verify no inline <script> tags visible in page source
deploymentNotes: Pages to deploy: Manager Actions (105), Operator Actions (84)
Deploy via git push (theme files) + deploy-pages.ps1 (page content)
No specialized script tag preservation needed (using external file)
Verify JavaScript loads correctly in browser DevTools
